subject: Got it, {{first_name}}. I will be in touch within two days.
body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Thank you for reaching out. I have received your enquiry for {{person_name}}'s {{occasion_type}} on {{occasion_date}} and I will be back to you personally within two days.

If anything else comes to mind before then, just reply to this email. I read every one.

{{#if occasion_book_opted_in}}

I have also added {{person_name}}'s {{occasion_type}} to my Occasion Book. This means next year I will reach out before the date so you never have to worry about remembering to order. You are already taken care of.

{{/if}}{{#if whatsapp_opted_in}}

You have signed up for WhatsApp reminders too. I will send you a personal message before the occasion each year.

{{/if}}

Speak soon,
Hazel

Hazel's Cake Lounge
{{business_phone}}
{{business_email}}

To unsubscribe from emails reply UNSUBSCRIBE.

subject: New enquiry: {{person_name}}'s {{occasion_type}} on {{occasion_date}}
body:
Hi Hazel,

A new enquiry has just come in.

Customer{{customer_name}}
Email{{customer_email}}
Phone{{customer_phone}}
Cake for{{person_name}}
Relationship{{relationship}}
Occasion{{occasion_type}}
Date{{occasion_date}}
Their idea{{customer_notes}}
Number of people{{number_of_people}}
Occasion Book{{occasion_book_status}}
WhatsApp reminders{{whatsapp_status}}

View this enquiry in your Command Centre:
{{admin_dashboard_url}}

You have 24 hours before a follow up reminder is sent to you.

subject: Reminder: {{customer_name}} has not heard back yet.
body:
Hi Hazel,

Just a gentle nudge. {{customer_name}} sent an enquiry 24 hours ago for {{person_name}}'s {{occasion_type}} on {{occasion_date}} and is still waiting for a reply.

View and respond in your Command Centre:
{{admin_dashboard_url}}

subject: {{person_name}}'s {{occasion_type}} is a month away, {{first_name}}.
body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Just a heads up that {{person_name}}'s {{occasion_type}} is coming up in about a month, on {{occasion_date}}.

{{#if previous_order}}

Last time I baked the {{previous_flavour}} for them. I would love to create something special again this year.

{{/if}}

My diary fills up quickly so it is worth getting in touch sooner rather than later.

Reply to this email or enquire here:
{{enquiry_url}}

Speak soon,
Hazel

subject: Two weeks until {{person_name}}'s {{occasion_type}}.
body:
Hi {{first_name}},

{{person_name}}'s {{occasion_type}} is two weeks away on {{occasion_date}}.

{{#if previous_order}}

You went with the {{previous_flavour}} last time. Would you like something new this year or shall we bring back a favourite?

{{/if}}

Let me know what you have in mind and I will take care of the rest.

{{enquiry_url}}

Hazel

subject: One week to go, {{first_name}}.
body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Just one week until {{person_name}}'s {{occasion_type}} on {{occasion_date}}.

My diary is filling up for that week so let us get your order sorted. I want to make sure {{person_name}} has something truly special.

Enquire here:
{{enquiry_url}}

Hazel

subject: How did {{person_name}}'s {{occasion_type}} go?
body:
Hi {{first_name}},

I hope {{person_name}}'s {{occasion_type}} was everything it should have been.

If you have a photo from the celebration I would love to see it. Just reply to this email with anything you want to share.

{{#if occasion_book_opted_in}}

I have already noted {{person_name}}'s {{occasion_type}} for next year. I will be in touch before the date so you never have to think about it.

{{/if}}

Thank you for trusting me with your special occasion.

Hazel

subject: Happy Birthday, {{first_name}}.
body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Happy Birthday.

I hope today is as wonderful as you are.

With love,
Hazel

subject: Your Cake Memory Card is inside, {{first_name}}.
body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Your Cake Memory Card for {{person_name}}'s {{occasion_type}} is attached to this email.

It is yours to keep. A small record of a moment worth remembering.

Thank you for letting me be part of it.

Hazel

subject: Is there anyone else I should know about, {{first_name}}?
body:
Hi {{first_name}},

I loved baking for {{person_name}}'s {{occasion_type}}. It was a pleasure.

I keep an Occasion Book for every person I bake for. A personal record of every celebration, so I can reach out before each one and make sure no one goes uncelebrated.

If there are other people in your life worth remembering, a mother, a partner, a best friend, I would love to add them too.

Just reply to this email with their name, their birthday or occasion, and your relationship to them. I will take care of the rest.

No forms. No fuss. Just a reply.

Hazel

subject: Here is what we are celebrating together this year, {{first_name}}.
body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Happy New Year.

Here are the occasions I am already looking forward to celebrating with you this year:

{{occasion_list}}

I will be in touch before each one so nothing sneaks up on you.

Looking forward to baking for you again.

Hazel

subject: Your invoice from Hazel's Cake Lounge, {{first_name}}.
body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Your invoice for {{person_name}}'s {{occasion_type}} is attached to this email.

Once your deposit is received I will confirm your order and get started.

Any questions, just reply here.

Hazel

subject: Added to your Occasion Book, {{first_name}}.
body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Done. I have added {{person_name}}'s {{occasion_type}} on {{occasion_date}} to your Occasion Book.

I will reach out before the date so you never have to remember. That is my job now.

Warmly,
Hazel
